text: Interesting preprint on adaptive enrichment designs in phase III oncology trials â€” the Bayesian borrowing approach for historical controls is handling the heterogeneity better than I expected. Worth watching. #clinicaltrials #biostatistics

Wrapped up fall semester at Amberfield. PH 206 students really pushed on the permutation testing material this year â€” good questions about multiple comparison corrections in public health surveillance contexts. Teaching sharpens your own thinking. #publichealth #biostatistics
